description_long: This is a modern two-story house surrounded by dense, leafy trees on all sides, providing a sense of privacy and seclusion. The house features a flat roof and a clean, boxy architectural design with large rectangular windows and a mix of light and medium-toned exterior finishes. The front facade includes a prominent entryway with a small set of steps, a covered porch, and a garage door adjacent to the main entrance. The property is bordered by a paved street with parked cars, and the landscaping is dominated by mature trees that partially obscure the house from certain angles. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some large panes and others smaller, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The overall setting suggests a suburban or urban neighborhood with a focus on modern living and natural surroundings.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and surrounded by dense trees, featuring a prominent entryway and garage facing a paved street.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, and street access, with trees framing the house.
description_view_1: Side/rear view mostly obscured by trees, with the house barely visible behind dense foliage.
description_view_2: Rear view almost completely hidden by a thick line of trees, with only the roof and some structure visible.
description_view_3: Side view with the house partially visible behind trees, and the street running along the right edge.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small set of steps, covered porch, and adjacent garage door, featuring a modern, minimalist design.
